---
title: "Resume"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: right
---

**Axel Martinez** · Rexburg, ID · (208) 227-3581 · [mar24067@byui.edu](mailto:mar24067@byui.edu) · [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/soyaxelmartinez/)

Financial Economics student with a minor in Data Science and an emphasis in Accounting, bringing strong analytical skills, advanced Excel capabilities, and experience translating data into actionable recommendations. Proven leader with consulting, sales, and cross-cultural experience. Bilingual professional seeking finance, accounting, or data analytics internships.

## Education

:::: {.resume-entry}
::: {.entry-head}
**Bachelor of Science in Financial Economics — Brigham Young University–Idaho** <span class="entry-date">Apr 2024 – Dec 2027</span>
:::
::: {.entry-sub}
Rexburg, ID · GPA 3.72 · Minors (Emphasis) in Accounting and Data Science
:::
::::

## Experience

:::: {.resume-entry}
::: {.entry-head}
**Student Consultant on Teaching — Team Lead** <span class="entry-date">Sep 2024 – Present</span>
:::
::: {.entry-sub}
Brigham Young University–Idaho · Rexburg, ID
:::
- Collected, analyzed, and synthesized performance data from 100+ courses to support data-driven operational and instructional improvements
- Reviewed and evaluated 100+ peer consultation reports, delivering structured recommendations transferable to financial analysis and business consulting
- Achieved fastest consultation turnaround on the team for 20 consecutive months, reducing average processing time by 67%
- Facilitated strategy discussions with 50+ faculty members, translating analytical findings into implementation plans
- Redesigned the certification and onboarding handbook, cutting training completion time from 8 weeks to 4 weeks
- Implemented structured task tracking for a 6-person team, increasing accountability and cutting clarification requests by 30%
::::

:::: {.resume-entry}
::: {.entry-head}
**Salesman — Turistik** <span class="entry-date">May 2023 – Jul 2023</span>
:::
::: {.entry-sub}
Santiago, Chile
:::
- Sold 40+ tour packages through consultative selling and tailored recommendations
- Contributed to a 54% increase in team sales conversion rate during peak winter season
- Communicated fluently in English, Spanish, and Portuguese to assist 25+ international clients, fostering cross-cultural connections and customer satisfaction
::::

## Volunteer Experience

:::: {.resume-entry}
::: {.entry-head}
**Full-Time Missionary — The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints** <span class="entry-date">Apr 2021 – Apr 2023</span>
:::
::: {.entry-sub}
Viña del Mar, Chile
:::
- Supervised and mentored teams of up to 26 individuals, driving performance improvements and fostering collaboration across assigned divisions
- Hosted 7 regional mentoring conferences and conducted 30+ one-on-one training sessions to boost team development, goal execution, and productivity
- Trained and supported 2 new team members in acquiring a foreign language and adapting to a new culture, accelerating integration and performance
::::

## Certifications

- **Bloomberg Market Concepts (BMC)** — Certificate ID: 3SphBFjNVsJF1hudCiBXRJYz
- **MyEducator Excel** — Certificate ID: 5c1b8627-f25a-4b53-9673-51319518ba78
- **JA Company Program (Business Management)** — Santiago, Chile, 2018

## Skills

<span class="badge-skill">Excel (Pivot Tables, Data Viz, VBA)</span>
<span class="badge-skill">SQL (MySQL)</span>
<span class="badge-skill">Python</span>
<span class="badge-skill">HTML</span>
<span class="badge-skill">Bloomberg Terminal</span>
<span class="badge-skill">Data analysis & reporting</span>

## Languages

<span class="badge-skill">English (Bilingual)</span>
<span class="badge-skill">Spanish (Native)</span>
<span class="badge-skill">Portuguese (Intermediate)</span>
